person.name: Sybille de BLOIS
person.alternateName: Viscountess Sybille FitzStephen de Blois De Leon
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
geni.com
Sybille of Blois
Also Known As:	"Sybilla"
Birthdate:	around 1115
Birthplace:	Orleanais/Centre,, Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, France
Death:	1141 (21-30)
Immediate Family:	
Daughter of Dameta Concubine 2 de Normandie
Wife of Hervé II "le Grand" de Léon and Hervé II "le Grand", comte de Léon
Mother of 
Sibille de Léon ; 
Count Guiomar de Léon, III ; 
Hamon de Léon, Bishop of Léon ; * ; 
Elimaire, Abbé de Landévennec 

Half sister of Gervaise de Blois, Abbot of Westminster ; Almaric de Blois and Ralph de Blois; and Alienor de Léon « less

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybille de BLOIS於大約1120年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre26歲，母親Mathilde de Boulogne16歲。她於1135年與Vicomte Hervé II de LÉON在法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾沙吉波爾-德-萊結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybille de BLOIS于大约1120年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre26岁，母亲Mathilde de Boulogne16岁。她于1135年与Vicomte Hervé II de LÉON在法国布列塔尼分尼斯艾沙吉波爾-德-萊结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BLOIS
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Sybille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sybil
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybille de BLOIS was born about 1120, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre, was 26 and her mother, Mathilde de Boulogne, was 16. She married Vicomte Hervé II de LÉON in 1135, in Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters.

Elle a épousé Vicomte Hervé II de LÉON en 1135, à Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles.

ko.lifeSummary: Sybille de BLOIS(이)가 대략 1120년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Boulogne(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1135년 프랑스 브레타그니 핑니스트e르 세인트-포-데-e에서 Vicomte Hervé II de LÉON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.
